gxcr_result_token_t Union Reference
[Crypto API (gxcr/gxcr.h)]

The result from the Packet Processing engine. More...


Data Fields

struct {
   uint32_t   result_packet_length: 17
 Length, in bytes, of the result packet.
   uint32_t   e0_e14: 15
 Error codes returned by the Packet Processor.
   uint32_t   bypass_data: 4
 Number of 4-byte words of data returned in the bypass_token_data field.
   uint32_t   e15: 1
 Error code.
   uint32_t   reserved_0: 16
 Reserved field.
   uint32_t   H: 1
 Indicates that hash bytes are appended to result packet.
   uint32_t   hash_bytes: 6
 Number of appended hash bytes.
   uint32_t   B: 1
 Indicates that generic bytes are appended to result packet.
   uint32_t   C: 1
 Indicates that a checksum is appended to the result packet.
   uint32_t   N: 1
 Indicates that a next-header field is appended to the result packet.
   uint32_t   L: 1
 Indicates that a length field is appended to the result packet.
   uint32_t   output_packet_pointer: 32
 Copy of 'output packet pointer' from the input token.
   uint32_t   next_header_field: 8
 Value that was used to update the 'next header' field in the IP header of the result packet.
   uint32_t   pad_length: 8
 Number of padding bytes removed from the result packet.
   uint32_t   reserved_1: 16
 Reserved field.
   uint32_t   bypass_token_data [4]
 Bypass data from token.
}; 
uint32_t word [8]
 Word access to bitfields.

Detailed Description

The result from the Packet Processing engine.

See Appendix D of the I/O Device Guide (UG404) for more detail.

Examples:

mica/ipsec/app.c.

Field Documentation

uint32_t gxcr_result_token_t::result_packet_length

Length, in bytes, of the result packet.

uint32_t gxcr_result_token_t::e0_e14

Error codes returned by the Packet Processor.

uint32_t gxcr_result_token_t::bypass_data

Number of 4-byte words of data returned in the bypass_token_data field.

uint32_t gxcr_result_token_t::e15

Error code.

uint32_t gxcr_result_token_t::reserved_0

Reserved field.

uint32_t gxcr_result_token_t::H

Indicates that hash bytes are appended to result packet.

uint32_t gxcr_result_token_t::hash_bytes

Number of appended hash bytes.

uint32_t gxcr_result_token_t::B

Indicates that generic bytes are appended to result packet.

uint32_t gxcr_result_token_t::C

Indicates that a checksum is appended to the result packet.

uint32_t gxcr_result_token_t::N

Indicates that a next-header field is appended to the result packet.

uint32_t gxcr_result_token_t::L

Indicates that a length field is appended to the result packet.

uint32_t gxcr_result_token_t::output_packet_pointer

Copy of 'output packet pointer' from the input token.

uint32_t gxcr_result_token_t::next_header_field

Value that was used to update the 'next header' field in the IP header of the result packet.

uint32_t gxcr_result_token_t::pad_length

Number of padding bytes removed from the result packet.

uint32_t gxcr_result_token_t::reserved_1

Reserved field.

uint32_t gxcr_result_token_t::bypass_token_data[4]

Bypass data from token.

uint32_t gxcr_result_token_t::word[8]

Word access to bitfields.
